name: Alvéole
author: Cédric Leclinche / AGP port
description: Lines of Action on a hexagonal honeycomb board (5 cells per side, 61 cells). Slide a piece along one of the six hex directions exactly as many cells as there are pieces (both colours) on that whole line; jump your own pieces, capture an enemy by landing on it. Bring all your surviving pieces into a single connected group to win — but a capture that leaves the OPPONENT connected hands THEM the win.
